Phosphene ķĆåÕÉæõ║åĶŗ╣µ×£ń¦üµ£ēµĪåµ×Č WallpaperExtensionKit’╝īÕ«×ńÄ░õ║åõĖĆÕźŚµÄźĶ┐æń│╗ń╗¤ÕÄ¤ńö¤ńÜäĶ¦åķóæÕŻüń║Ėµ¢╣µĪłŃĆé

Õ«āõ╝Üńø┤µÄźµÄźÕģź macOS ńÜäń│╗ń╗¤ÕŻüń║ĖńĢīķØó’╝īń£ŗĶĄĘµØźÕÆīĶŗ╣µ×£Ķć¬ÕĖ”ńÜä Aerial ÕŻüń║ĖÕćĀõ╣ÄõĖĆµĀĘŃĆé

.wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --appmsgExtra-BG: #121212; } } .wx-root, body { --new-title-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, .9); } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --new-title-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, .8); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { rgba(255, 255, 255, .7); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --new-content-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, .7); } } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body.appmsg_content_new_ui { --new-content-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, .55); } } .wx_tap_highlight_active.wx_tap_link { opacity: 0.5; } .wx_tap_highlight_active.wx_tap_card { background-color: rgb(235, 235, 235); } .wx_tap_highlight_active.wx_tap_cell { background-color: var(--weui-FG-5); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx_tap_highlight_active.wx_tap_card { background-color: rgb(43, 43, 43); } } .wx_css_active:active { opacity: 0.5; } ------MultipartBoundary--O3bHuCGcN1IEAj0JQWQZ7xoV0BvmXQfkwiPGevl8iP---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-Location: https://res.wx.qq.com/mmbizappmsg/zh_CN/assets/keyboard.mpfd2poua9151d16.css @charset "utf-8"; .comment_primary_emotion_list_mobile_wrp { bottom: 0px; left: 0px; right: 0px; padding: 8px calc(0px + env(safe-area-inset-right)) calc(44px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)) calc(0px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); position: fixed; z-index: 9999; height: 300px; box-sizing: border-box; background-color: var(--weui-BG-0); overflow-y: scroll; font-size: 32px; text-size-adjust: none; } .comment_primary_emotion_list_mobile_wrp::before { content: ""; position: fixed; bottom: 300px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 1px; transform: scaleY(0.5); background: var(--weui-FG-3); } .comment_primary_emotion_list_mobile { margin: 0px 8px; } .comment_primary_emotion_list_mobile_grid .comment_primary_emotion_list_mobile { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, 48px); justify-content: space-between; } .comment_primary_emotion_list_mobile_flex .comment_primary_emotion_list_mobile { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; } .comment_primary_emotion_list_mobile .comment_primary_emotion { width: 32px; height: 32px; } .comment_primary_emotion_item { padding: 8px; list-style: none; border-radius: 4px; } .comment_primary_emotion_item:active { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .comment_primary_emotion { display: block; margin-top: 0px; width: 1em; height: 1em; font-size: inherit; } .comment_primary_emotion_list_mobile_title { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--weui-FG-0); padding: 12px 16px 8px; } .comment_primary_emotion_list_mobile_del_btn_wrp { position: fixed; right: 0px; bottom: 0px; padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom); padding-right: 12px; } .comment_primary_emotion_list_mobile_del_btn_wrp::before { pointer-events: none; content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: 0px; right: 0px; width: 104px; height: 124px; background: linear-gradient(rgba(237, 237, 237, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237) 50px, rgb(237, 237, 237) 100%); } .comment_primary_emotion_list_mobile_del_btn.comment_primary_emotion_list_mobile_del_btn { position: relative; z-index: 1; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0px 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; min-height: 44px; border-radius: 4.8px; color: var(--weui-FG-0); font-size: 0px; background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); } .comment_primary_emotion_list_mobile_del_btn.comment_primary_emotion_list_mobile_del_btn::before { content: ""; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; width: 24px; height: 24px; mask: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24'%3E %3Cpath fill-opacity='.9' fill-rule='evenodd' d='M20.5 4A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 22 5.5v13a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.5 1.5H8.47a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.192-.589l-4.97-6.5a1.5 1.5 0 0 1 0-1.822l4.97-6.5A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 8.47 4H20.5zm0 1.2H8.47a.3.3 0 0 0-.239.118l-4.97 6.5a.3.3 0 0 0 0 .364l4.97 6.5a.3.3 0 0 0 .239.118H20.5a.3.3 0 0 0 .3-.3v-13a.3.3 0 0 0-.3-.3zM17 8l1 1-3 3 3 3-1 1-3-3-3 3-1-1 3-3-3-3 1-1 3 3 3-3z'/%3E%3C/svg%3E") 50% 50% / cover no-repeat; background-color: currentcolor; } .comment_primary_emotion_list_pc { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; padding: 0px 8px; width: 330px; overflow: hidden; font-size: 24px; position: relative; z-index: 2; background: var(--weui-BG-5); } .comment_primary_emotion_list_pc .comment_primary_emotion_item { padding: 4px; } .comment_primary_emotion_list_pc .comment_primary_emotion_item:hover { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .comment_primary_emotion_item:active { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .comment_primary_emotion_list_mobile_del_btn_wrp::before { background: linear-gradient(rgba(17, 17, 17, 0), rgb(17, 17, 17) 50px, rgb(17, 17, 17) 100%); } .comment_primary_emotion_list_pc .comment_primary_emotion_item:hover { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } } .pages_skin_pc .comment_primary_emotion_tail { width: 14px; height: 14px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16) 0px 2px 8px; position: absolute; border-radius: 1px; background: var(--weui-BG-5); bottom: -7px; right: 50%; transform: translate(50%) rotate(45deg); } .pages_skin_pc .comment_primary_emotion_tail_mask { right: 8px; left: 8px; height: 8px; background: var(--weui-BG-5); bottom: 0px; position: absolute; } .pages_skin_pc .position_up-right .comment_primary_emotion_tail, .pages_skin_pc .position_down-right .comment_primary_emotion_tail, .pages_skin_pc .position_up-left .comment_primary_emotion_tail, .pages_skin_pc .position_down-left .comment_primary_emotion_tail { display: none; } .pages_skin_pc .comment_primary_emotion_panel__over_right_boundary .comment_primary_emotion_tail { right: 23px; } .comment__push__container, .comment__push__container * { overscroll-behavior: contain; } .comment__push__container.overscroll-behavior_none, .comment__push__container.overscroll-behavior_none * { overscroll-behavior: none; } body { --appmsg-comment-push-wrp-bg: var(--weui-BG-1); --appmsg-comment-push-inner-bg: var(--weui-BG-5); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body .new_bg_color { --appmsg-comment-push-wrp-bg: #323232; --appmsg-comment-push-inner-bg: #383838; } } .comment__push__container { --INPUT-LINE-HEIGHT: 20px; --INPUT-LINE-HEIGHT-EM: 1.25em; --INPUT-PADDING: 10px; } .comment__push__container .text_size_adjust_none { text-size-adjust: none; } .comment__push__mask { position: fixed; inset: 0px; z-index: 5049; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6); } .comment__push__mask.comment__push__mask__transparent { background-color: transparent; } .fullscreen-padding .comment__push__mask { transition: opacity 0.3s; } .comment__push__wrp { --transparent-caret-color: #ffffff00; position: fixed; left: 0px; right: 0px; z-index: 9999; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background-color: var(--appmsg-comment-push-wrp-bg); transition: transform 0.2s ease-out, opacity 0.2s ease-out; padding: 8px 20px; } .comment__push__wrp.comment__push__type__flex { padding: 8px 16px; } .comment__push__wrp.comment__push__type__flex .cannotusepic .comment__push__outcontainer { max-width: calc(100% - 76px); } .comment__push__wrp.comment__push__type__flex .comment__push__outcontainer { max-width: calc(100% - 112px); } .comment__push__wrp.comment__push__type__flex .comment__push__input_toolbar { position: static; padding: var(--INPUT-PADDING) 0; font-size: var(--INPUT-LINE-HEIGHT); height: 1em; min-height: var(--INPUT-LINE-HEIGHT); display: flex; align-items: center; } .comment__push__wrp.comment__push__type__flex .comment__push__input_toolbar .comment__push__emoji, .comment__push__wrp.comment__push__type__flex .comment__push__input_toolbar .comment__push__keyboard, .comment__push__wrp.comment__push__type__flex .comment__push__input_toolbar .comment__push__pictures { margin-left: 8px; width: 28px; height: 28px; } .comment__push__wrp.comment__push__preset__rich_text .comment__push__input__faker { white-space: pre-wrap; } .comment__push__wrp.comment__push__preset__rich_text .comment__push__input__plain_text { display: none; } .comment__push__wrp.comment__push__preset__rich_text .comment__push__input__rich_text { display: inline-block; } .comment__push__wrp::after { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 100%; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100vh; background-color: var(--appmsg-comment-push-wrp-bg); } .comment__push__wrp .comment__push__input__rich_text { display: none; white-space: pre-wrap; } .comment__push__wrp .comment__push__input__rich_text, .comment__push__wrp .comment__push__input__fake__rich_text { user-select: text; overflow: scroll; } .comment__push__wrp .comment__push__input__rich_text.rich_text_selectednode, .comment__push__wrp .comment__push__input__fake__rich_text.rich_text_selectednode { caret-color: var(--transparent-caret-color); } .comment__push__wrp .comment__push__input__rich_text.rich_text_selectednode ::selection, .comment__push__wrp .comment__push__input__fake__rich_text.rich_text_selectednode ::selection { background-color: transparent; } .comment__push__wrp .comment__push__input__rich_text::selection, .comment__push__wrp .comment__push__input__fake__rich_text::selection { background-color: rgba(7, 193, 96, 0.2); } .comment__push__wrp .comment__push__input__rich_text img, .comment__push__wrp .comment__push__input__fake__rich_text img { pointer-events: none; user-select: none; } .comment__push__wrp .comment__push__input__rich_text .rich_text_selectednode, .comment__push__wrp .comment__push__input__fake__rich_text .rich_text_selectednode { background: rgba(7, 193, 96, 0.2); user-select: text; -webkit-user-modify: read-only; -webkit-user-drag: element; } ""; height: 20px; background: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)); display: block; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 8px; right: 0px; border-radius: 4px 4px 0px 0px; .delete_img::after { content: ""; position: absolute; width: 12px; height: 1px; top: 50%; left: 4px; transform: translateY(-0.5px) rotate(-45deg); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .comment__push__img_container::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; } .comment__push .comment__push__upper_container { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; } mask-position: center center; mask-repeat: no-repeat; mask-size: contain; } .comment__push__inner { padding: var(--INPUT-PADDING) 0; } .comment__push__input_wrp { position: relative; flex: 1 1 0%; border-radius: 4px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .comment__push__input_wrp .comment__push__input__faker { min-height: var(--INPUT-LINE-HEIGHT-EM); word-break: break-all; opacity: 0; } .comment__push__input_wrp .comment__push__input__faker, .comment__push__input_wrp .comment__push__input { box-sizing: border-box; padding: 0px 8px; line-height: 1.25; max-height: calc(var(--INPUT-LINE-HEIGHT-EM) * 7); } .comment__push__input_wrp .comment__push__input { position: absolute; z-index: 999; inset: 0px; width: 100%; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: none; resize: none; font-size: inherit; font-family: inherit; outline: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8); text-size-adjust: inherit; } .comment__push__input_wrp .comment__push__input::placeholder { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); font-size: 15px; } .comment__push__input__img { height: 48px; width: 48px; margin: 0px 0px 8px 8px; border-radius: 4px; } img.comment__push__input__img { object-fit: cover; } .comment__push__extend { line-height: 36px; display: flex; align-items: center; margin-top: 8px; } .comment__push__extend div { display: flex; } .emoji-wrp { padding-top: 5px; } .comment__push__extend-canusepic { padding-left: 30px; justify-content: space-between; } .cannotusepic .comment__push__extend-canusepic { align-items: flex-end; padding-bottom: 4px; } .comment__push__input__counter { line-height: 1.4; font-size: 12px; color: var(--weui-FG-2); margin-top: 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; } .comment__push__input__counter_warn { color: var(--weui-RED); } .comment__push__cancel { color: var(--weui-LINK); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; margin-right: 12px; } .comment__push__send { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-left: 12px; line-height: 36px; width: 58px; height: 32px; text-align: center; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 6px; background-color: rgb(7, 193, 96); color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; } .comment__push__send:active { background-color: rgb(6, 173, 86); color: rgb(229, 229, 229) !important; } .comment__push__send.disabled { background: var(--weui-FG-5); color: var(--weui-FG-4) !important; } .comment__push__emoji, .comment__push__keyboard, .comment__push__pictures { margin-left: 12px; width: 28px; height: 28px; background-color: currentcolor; font-size: 0px; color: var(--weui-FG-0) !important; } .comment__push__pictures { margin-left: 8px; } .comment__push__emoji 15h6v2H9v-2zm3.5-4h2v2h-2v-2zm3 0h2v2h-2v-2z' fill-rule='evenodd'/%3E%3C/svg%3E") center center / cover no-repeat; } .comment__emoji__panel .comment_primary_emotion_item:hover { background-color: transparent; } .comment__push__container__horizontal .comment__push__wrp, .comment__push__container__horizontal .comment__emoji__panel { padding-left: 120px; padding-right: 120px; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .comment__push__wrp { --transparent-caret-color: #2c2c2c00; background-color: rgb(30, 30, 30); } .comment__push__input_wrp { background-color: rgb(42, 42, 42); } .comment__push__input_wrp .comment__push__input { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } .comment__push__input_wrp .comment__push__input::placeholder { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); font-size: 15px; } } .text-placeholder { z-index: 99; position: absolute; display: flex; top: -0.15em; left: 8px; color: var(--weui-FG-2); width: calc(100% - 16px); } .text-placeholder .comment__push__placeholder { display: flex; align-items: center; width: 100%; } .text-placeholder .comment__push__placeholder .comment__push__placeholder__nickname, .text-placeholder .comment__push__placeholder .comment__push__placeholder__text { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .text-placeholder .comment__push__placeholder .js_icon_channels_input { width: 1.6em !important; height: 1.6em !important; } .js_icon_channels_input { margin-right: 0.4em; margin-top: -0.25em; width: 1.6em !important; height: 1.6em !important; } .cannotusepic { display: flex; } .cannotusepic .comment__push__upper_container { flex: 1 1 0%; } .cannotusepic .comment__push__extend-canusepic { padding-left: 0px; } .cannotusepic .cannotusepic_icon { display: none; } .cannotusepic .comment__push__send { margin-top: 0px; } .comment__push__toast { position: fixed; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); z-index: 9999; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--weui-WHITE); padding: 12px 20px; background-color: rgb(76, 76, 76); border-radius: 8px; } .comment__push__wrp { padding: 8px 20px; } .comment__push__wrp.need_safe_bottom { padding-bottom: calc(8px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); } .comment__push__inner { flex: 1 1 0%; min-width: 0px; border-radius: 4px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .comment__push__container .comment__push__input::placeholder { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); font-size: 16px; } .comment__push__send { font-size: 14px; line-height: 2; width: auto; padding: 0px 12px; margin-left: 8px; margin-top: 6px; } .comment__push__emoji, .comment__push__keyboard { width: 28px; height: 28px; } .comment__push__extend { padding-bottom: 0px; } .comment__push__extend .weui-wa-hotarea::after { min-width: 100%; min-height: 44px; padding: 0px 4px; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .comment__push__inner { background-color: rgb(44, 44, 44); } .comment__push__container .comment__push__input::placeholder { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } } .comment__push_danmu .comment__push__mask { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .comment__push_danmu .comment__push__wrp { background: transparent; padding: 8px calc(14px + env(safe-area-inset-right)) 8px calc(16px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); } .comment__push_danmu .comment__push__inner { background: transparent; padding: 0px; } .comment__push_danmu .comment__push__input_wrp { background: rgba(237, 237, 237, 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(40px); border-radius: 4px; margin: 0px; } .comment__push_danmu .comment__push__input__faker, .comment__push_danmu .comment__push__input { padding: 10px 8px; } .comment__push_danmu .comment__push__input { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); } .comment__push_danmu .comment__push__input::placeholder { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .comment__push_danmu .comment__push__extend { padding-bottom: 4px; } .comment__push_danmu .comment__push__send { border-radius: 6px; margin-left: 8px; line-height: 32px; } .comment__push_danmu .comment__push__emoji, .comment__push_danmu .comment__push__keyboard, .comment__push_danmu .comment__push__pictures { margin-left: 8px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; width: 28px; height: 28px; mask-size: cover; background: currentcolor; } .comment__push_danmu .comment__push__emoji { mask: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='32' height='32' viewBox='0 0 32 32'%3E %3Cpath fill='%23FFF' fill-rule='evenodd' d='M16 2.667c7.364 0 13.333 5.97 position: fixed; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 1px; transform: scaleY(0.5); background: var(--weui-FG-3); } .comment__push__container .comment__emoji__panel::before { display: none; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .comment__push_danmu .comment__push__input { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } .comment__push_danmu .comment__push__input::placeholder { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, .comment__push_danmu.comment__push_immersive .comment__push__wrp { background-color: rgb(25, 25, 25); } .comment__push_danmu.comment__push_immersive .comment__push__wrp .comment__push__inner { https://res.wx.qq.com/t/wx_fed/weui-source/res/2.6.26/weui.min.css @charset "utf-8"; .wx-root, body, page { --weui-BTN-HEIGHT: 48; --weui-BTN-HEIGHT-MEDIUM: 40; --weui-BTN-HEIGHT-SMALL: 32; } .wx-root, body { --weui-BTN-ACTIVE-MASK: rgba(0,0,0,.2); } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --weui-BTN-ACTIVE-MASK: hsla(0,0%,100%,.2); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --weui-BTN-ACTIVE-MASK: hsla(0,0%,100%,.2); } } .wx-root, body { --weui-BTN-DEFAULT-ACTIVE-BG: #e6e6e6; } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --weui-BTN-DEFAULT-ACTIVE-BG: hsla(0,0%,100%,.126); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --weui-BTN-DEFAULT-ACTIVE-BG: hsla(0,0%,100%,.126); } } .wx-root, body { --weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR: rgba(0,0,0,.1); } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR: hsla(0,0%,100%,.1); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR: hsla(0,0%,100%,.1); } } html { text-size-adjust: 100%; } body { line-height: 1.6; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif; } * { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; outline: 0px; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } a img { border: 0px; } a { text-decoration: none; cursor: default; } input, textarea { caret-color: var(--weui-BRAND); } ::-webkit-input-placeholder { color: var(--weui-FG-2); } ::placeholder { color: var(--weui-FG-2); } .wx-root, body { --weui-BG-0: #ededed; --weui-BG-1: #f7f7f7; --weui-BG-2: #fff; --weui-BG-3: #f7f7f7; --weui-BG-4: #4c4c4c; --weui-BG-5: #fff; --weui-BLUE-100: #10aeff; --weui-BLUE-120: #3fbeff; --weui-BLUE-170: #b7e6ff; --weui-BLUE-80: #0c8bcc; --weui-BLUE-90: #0e9ce6; --weui-BLUE-BG-100: width: 6.4em; height: 6.4em; } .weui-icon_msg-primary.weui-icon_msg-primary.weui-icon-warn { color: var(--weui-YELLOW); } .weui-hidden_abs { opacity: 0; position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; overflow: hidden; } .weui-a11y_ref { display: none; } .weui-hidden-space:empty::before { content: "┬Ā"; position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; overflow: hidden; } .weui-a11y-combo { position: relative; } .weui-a11y-combo__helper { opacity: 0; position: absolute; width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; } .weui-a11y-combo__content { position: relative; z-index: 1; } .weui-wa-hotarea-el { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); min-width: 44px; min-height: 44px; width: 100%; height: 100%; } .weui-wa-hotarea, .weui-wa-hotarea-el__wrp, .weui-wa-hotarea_before { position: relative; } .weui-wa-hotarea-el__wrp a, .weui-wa-hotarea-el__wrp button, .weui-wa-hotarea-el__wrp navigator, .weui-wa-hotarea_before a, .weui-wa-hotarea_before button, .weui-wa-hotarea_before navigator, .weui-wa-hotarea a, .weui-wa-hotarea button, .weui-wa-hotarea navigator { position: relative; z-index: 1; } .weui-wa-hotarea::after, .weui-wa-hotarea_before::before { content: ""; pointer-events: auto; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); min-width: 44px; min-height: 44px; width: 100%; height: 100%; } .weui-link { -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .weui-link, .weui-link:visited { color: var(--weui-LINK); } .weui-link:active { opacity: 0.5; } .weui-btn { position: relative; display: block; min-width: 184px; max-width: 280px; width: fit-content; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; padding: 12px 24px; box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: 500; font-size: 17px; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); line-height: 1.41176; border-radius: 8px; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); cursor: default; user-select: none; } .weui-btn:active::before { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; background-color: var(--weui-BTN-ACTIVE-MASK); border-radius: 8px; } .weui-btn:active.weui-btn_disabled::before, .weui-btn:active.weui-btn_loading::before, .weui-btn:active[disabled]::before { display: none; } .weui-btn__inner { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .weui-btn_block { width: auto; } .weui-btn_inline { display: inline-block; } .weui-btn_default { background-color: var(--weui-FG-5); } .weui-btn_default, .weui-btn_default:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .weui-btn_primary { background-color: var(--weui-BRAND); } .weui-btn_primary:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_warn { background-color: var(--weui-RED-100); } .weui-btn_warn:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_primary { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_primary:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_default { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: rgba(247, 247, 247, 0.3); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_default:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_warn { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: var(--weui-RED-100); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_warn:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_disabled, .weui-btn_overlay[disabled] { color: rgba(247, 247, 247, 0.3); background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .weui-btn[disabled], .weui-btn_disabled { color: var(--weui-FG-4); background-color: var(--weui-FG-5); } .weui-btn_loading .weui-mask-loading { font-size: 20px; margin: -0.2em 4px 0px 0px; color: currentcolor; } .weui-btn_loading .weui-mask-loading.weui-mask-loading_only { margin-right: 0px; } .weui-btn_loading.weui-btn_default .weui-mask-loading { color: rgb(96, 96, 96); } .weui-btn_loading .weui-loading { font-size: 20px; margin: -0.2em 4px 0px 0px; } .weui-btn_loading .weui-primary-loading { font-size: 20px; margin: -0.2em 4px 0px 0px; vertical-align: middle; color: currentcolor; } .weui-btn_loading .weui-primary-loading::before { content: ""; } .weui-btn_cell { position: relative; display: block; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 17px; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); line-height: .weui-form-preview__btn:first-child::after { display: none; } .weui-form-preview__btn_default { color: var(--weui-FG-HALF); } .weui-form-preview__btn_primary { color: var(--weui-LINK); } .weui-gallery__del { display: block; padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom); } .weui-gallery__del:active { opacity: 0.5; } .weui-cell_switch { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; } .weui-cell_switch.weui-cell_disabled, .weui-cell_switch.weui-cell_readonly { color: var(--weui-FG-3); } .weui-switch { appearance: none; } .weui-switch, .weui-switch-cp__box { vertical-align: bottom; 0.1s, border 0.1s; } .weui-switch-cp__box::after, .weui-switch::after { content: " "; position: absolute; top: 2px; left: 2px; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 15px; background-color: style='fill:white;fill-opacity:1;'/%3E%3C/svg%3E%0A"); } } .weui-agree_warn .weui-agree__text { color: var(--weui-RED); } .weui-agree_animate { animation: 0.3s ease 0s 1 normal none running e; } @-webkit-keyframes e { 0% { transform: translateX(0px); } 16% { transform: translateX(-8px); } 28% { transform: translateX(-16px); } 44% { transform: translateX(0px); } 59% { transform: translateX(-16px); } 73% { transform: translateX(0px); } 82% { transform: translateX(16px); } 94% { transform: translateX(8px); } 100% { transform: translateX(0px); } } @keyframes e { 0% { transform: translateX(0px); } 16% { transform: translateX(-8px); } 28% { transform: translateX(-16px); } 44% { transform: translateX(0px); } 59% { transform: translateX(-16px); } 73% { transform: translateX(0px); } 82% { transform: translateX(16px); } 94% { transform: translateX(8px); } 100% { transform: translateX(0px); } } .weui-primary-loading { font-size: 16px; display: inline-flex; position: relative; width: 1em; height: 1em; vertical-align: middle; color: rgb(96, 96, 96); animation: 1s steps(60) 0s infinite normal none running f; } .weui-primary-loading::after, .weui-primary-loading::before { content: ""; display: block; width: 0.5em; height: 1em; box-sizing: border-box; border: 0.0875em solid; } .weui-primary-loading::before { border-right-width: 0px; border-top-left-radius: 1em; border-bottom-left-radius: 1em; mask-image: -webkit-linear-gradient(top, rgb(0, 0, 0) 8%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 95%); } .weui-primary-loading::after { border-left-width: 0px; border-top-right-radius: 1em; border-bottom-right-radius: 1em; mask-image: -webkit-linear-gradient(top, transparent 8%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 95%); } .weui-primary-loading__dot { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 50%; margin-left: -0.04375em; width: 0.0875em; height: 0.0875em; border-top-right-radius: 100%; border-bottom-right-radius: 100%; background: currentcolor; } @-webkit-keyframes f { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(1turn); } } @keyframes f { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(1turn); } } .weui-primary-loading_brand { color: var(--weui-BRAND); } .weui-primary-loading_transparent { color: rgb(237, 237, 237); } .weui-loading { font-size: 16px; width: 1em; height: 1em; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; .weui-slider { padding: 15px 18px; user-select: none; } .weui-slider__inner { position: relative; height: 2px; background-color: var(--weui-FG-3); } .weui-slider__track { height: 100%; background-color: var(--weui-BRAND); width: 0px; } .weui-slider__handler { position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 50%; width: 28px; height: 28px; margin-left: -14px; margin-top: -14px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); box-shadow: 0 0 4px var(--weui-FG-3); } .weui-slider-box { display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; } .weui-slider-box .weui-slider { -webkit-box-flex: 1; flex: 1 1 0%; } .weui-slider-box__value { margin-left: 0.5em; min-width: 24px; color: var(--weui-FG-1); text-align: center; font-size: 14px; } ------MultipartBoundary--O3bHuCGcN1IEAj0JQWQZ7xoV0BvmXQfkwiPGevl8iP---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-Location: https://res.wx.qq.com/mmbizappmsg/zh_CN/htmledition/js/assets/tencent_portfolio_light.mpfd2pou0c499fc6.css @charset "utf-8"; :root { --articleFontsize: 17px; } h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 { font-weight: 400; font-size: 16px; } * { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } a { color: rgb(87, 107, 149); text-decoration: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); -webkit-user-drag: none; } html { text-size-adjust: 100%; } body { line-height: 1.6; letter-spacing: 0.034em; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } @font-face { font-family: "PingFang SC"; src: local("PingFang SC"); unicode-range: U+0-1F232, U+1F234, U+1F6A8, U+1F250, U+1F237-1F239, U+1F23B-1F24F, U+1F251-FFFFF; } body.wx_wap_page { font-family: "PingFang SC", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Helvetica Neue", "Hiragino Sans GB", "Microsoft YaHei UI", "Microsoft YaHei", Arial, sans-serif; } .rich_media_content { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); font-size: var(--articleFontsize); overflow: hidden; text-align: justify; } .rich_media_content * { max-width: 100% !important; box-sizing: border-box !important; overflow-wrap: break-word !important; } .rich_media_content p { clear: both; min-height: 1em; } .rich_media_content em { font-style: italic; } .rich_media_content fieldset { min-width: 0px; } body { text-underline-position: under; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; text-underline-offset: 0.1em; } @supports (-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch) { body { text-underline-position: from-font; } } .wxw-img { vertical-align: bottom; } blockquote { padding-left: 10px; border-left: 3px solid rgb(219, 219, 219); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); font-size: 15px; padding-top: 4px; margin: 1em 0px; text-indent: 0px; } .blockquote_info { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); margin-top: 1.17647em; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .blockquote_article { display: block; } .code-snippet, .code-snippet__fix, .code-snippet *, .code-snippet__fix * { max-width: 1000% !important; } .code-snippet { margin: 10px 0px; display: block; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; padding: 1em 1em 1em 3em; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); position: relative; background-color: rgb(250, 250, 250); border: 1px solid rgb(240, 240, 240); border-radius: 2px; counter-reset: line 0; white-space: normal; } .code-snippet code { text-align: left; font-size: 14px; display: block; white-space: pre-wrap; position: relative; font-family: Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Courier, monospace; } .code-snippet code::before { position: absolute; min-width: 1.5em; text-align: right; left: -2.5em; counter-increment: line 1; content: counter(line); display: inline; margin-right: 12px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15); } .code-snippet_nowrap code { white-space: pre; display: flex; } .code-snippet__fix { font-size: 14px; margin: 10px 0px; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); position: relative; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03); border: 1px solid rgb(240, 240, 240); border-radius: 2px; display: flex; line-height: 26px; } .code-snippet__fix pre { overflow-x: auto; padding: 1em 1em 1em 0px; white-space: normal; flex: 1 1 0%; } .code-snippet__fix code { text-align: left; font-size: 14px; white-space: pre; display: flex; position: relative; font-family: Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Courier, monospace; } .code-snippet__fix .code-snippet__line-index { counter-reset: line 0; flex-shrink: 0; height: 100%; padding: 1em; list-style-type: none; } .code-snippet__fix .code-snippet__line-index li { list-style-type: none; text-align: right; } .code-snippet__fix .code-snippet__line-index li::before { min-width: 1.5em; text-align: right; left: -2.5em; counter-increment: line 1; content: counter(line); display: inline; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15); } .code-snippet__comment, .code-snippet__quote { color: rgb(175, 175, 175); font-style: italic; } .code-snippet__keyword, .code-snippet__selector-tag, .code-snippet__subst { color: rgb(202, 125, 55); } .code-snippet__number, .code-snippet__literal, .code-snippet__variable, .code-snippet__template-variable, .code-snippet__tag .code-snippet__attr { color: rgb(14, 156, 229); } .code-snippet__string, .code-snippet__doctag, .code-snippet__title, .code-snippet__section, .code-snippet__selector-id { color: rgb(221, 17, 68); } .code-snippet__subst { font-weight: 400; } .code-snippet__type, .code-snippet__class .code-snippet__title { color: rgb(14, 156, 229); } .code-snippet__tag, .code-snippet__name, .code-snippet__attribute { color: rgb(14, 156, 229); font-weight: 400; } .code-snippet__regexp, .code-snippet__link { color: rgb(202, 125, 55); } .code-snippet__symbol, .code-snippet__bullet { color: rgb(221, 17, 68); } .code-snippet__built_in, .code-snippet__builtin-name { color: rgb(202, 125, 55); } .code-snippet__meta { color: rgb(175, 175, 175); } .code-snippet__deletion { background: rgb(255, 221, 221); } .code-snippet__addition { background: rgb(221, 255, 221); } .code-snippet__emphasis { font-style: italic; } .code-snippet__strong { font-weight: 700; } .autoTypeSetting > p { margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0.5em; } .autoTypeSetting24 > p { margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 24px; } .autoTypeSetting24psection > p { margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 24px; } .autoTypeSetting24psection > section { margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 24px; } .rich_media_content form { display: none !important; } a { color: var(--weui-LINK); } .rich_media_title { color: var(--new-title-color); } .rich_media_content { color: var(--new-content-color); } blockquote { color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .blockquote_info { color: var(--weui-FG-2); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) blockquote { border-color: rgb(64, 64, 64); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .code-snippet { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .code-snippet code::before { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .code-snippet__fix { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .code-snippet__fix .code-snippet__line-index li::before { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } } .radius_avatar { display: inline-block; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); padding: 3px; border-radius: 50%; overflow: hidden; vertical-align: middle; } .radius_avatar img { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: 50%; background-color: rgb(238, 238, 238); } body { color: var(--weui-FG-0); } body.mm_appmsg { box-sizing: border-box; background-color: var(--appmsgExtra-BG); padding-bottom: calc(env(safe-area-inset-bottom) + var(--appmsgPageBottomGap)); } body.mm_appmsg .rich_media_extra_discuss { padding-bottom: 0px; } body.mm_appmsg .rich_media_extra_discuss.rich_media_extra_discuss_loading, body.mm_appmsg .rich_media_extra_discuss.rich_media_extra_discuss_initial { background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); } body.mm_appmsg .rich_media_extra_discuss:not(.rich_media_extra_discuss_empty) { background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); } body.mm_appmsg.wx_wap_page_primary { background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); } body.mm_appmsg.wx_wap_page_primary .rich_media_area_extra { background-color: var(--appmsgExtra-BG); } body.rich_media_bottom_bar:not(.page_share_img) { padding-bottom: calc(55px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); } body.rich_media_bottom_bar:not(.page_share_img).mm_appmsg { padding-bottom: calc(var(--appmsgPageBottomGap) + 55px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); transition: padding-bottom 0.3s; } .appmsg_skin_default .rich_media_area_primary { background: var(--weui-BG-2); } .appmsg_skin_default .rich_media_area_primary .weui-loadmore_line:not(.weui-loadmore_default) .weui-loadmore__tips { background: var(--weui-BG-2); } .rich_media_area_primary { padding: calc(var(--richMediaAreaPrimaryPaddingTop) + env(safe-area-inset-top)) calc(var(--appmsgPageGap) + env(safe-area-inset-right)) 0 calc(var(--appmsgPageGap) + env(safe-area-inset-left)); } .fullscreen-padding .rich_media_area_primary { padding: calc(var(--richMediaAreaPrimaryPaddingTop) + var(--normal-top-insets)) calc(var(--appmsgPageGap) + env(safe-area-inset-right)) 0 calc(var(--appmsgPageGap) + env(safe-area-inset-left)); } .rich_media_area_primary.voice { padding-top: 66px; } body.fullscreen-padding::before { position: fixed; content: ""; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100vw; height: var(--normal-top-insets); background: var(--weui-BG-2); z-index: 500; } body.fullscreen-padding.fullscreen-padding__border::after { position: fixed; content: ""; top: var(--normal-top-insets); left: 0px; width: 100vw; height: var(--padding-border-height, 1px); transform: scaleY(0.3); transform-origin: center top; background: var(--weui-FG-3); z-index: 501; } .rich_media_title { font-size: 22px; line-height: 1.4; margin-bottom: 14px; font-weight: 500; } .js_title_inner { white-space: pre-wrap; } @supports (-webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch) { .rich_media_title { font-weight: 500; } } body.windows-title-bold .rich_media_title { font-weight: 700; } .rich_media_meta_list { margin-bottom: 22px; line-height: 20px; font-size: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .rich_media_meta_list em { font-style: normal; } .rich_media_meta_list .weui-wa-hotarea::after { min-height: 100%; min-width: 100%; padding: 5px 4px; } .rich_media_meta_list .rich_media_meta_padding .rich_media_meta:last-child { padding-right: 40px; } .rich_media_meta { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; margin: 0px 10px 10px 0px; font-size: 15px; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .rich_media_meta.icon_appmsg_tag { margin-right: 4px; } .rich_media_meta.appmsg_title_tag { margin-right: 8px; overflow: visible; } .rich_media_meta.meta_tag_text { margin-right: 0px; } .rich_media_meta_primary { display: block; margin-bottom: 10px; font-size: 15px; } .meta_enterprise_tag img { width: 30px; display: block; position: relative; margin-top: -3px; border: 0px; height: 30px !important; } .rich_media_meta_link { color: var(--weui-LINK); } .rich_media_meta_text { color: var(--weui-FG-2); } .rich_media_meta_text.rich_media_meta_split { padding-left: 10px; } .rich_media_meta_text.rich_media_meta_split::before { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 0px; margin-top: -6px; content: " "; display: block; border-left: 1px solid var(--weui-FG-1); width: 200%; height: 130%; box-sizing: border-box; transform: scale(0.5); transform-origin: 0px 0px; } .rich_media_meta_text.article_modify_tag, .rich_media_meta_nickname { position: relative; } .rich_media_meta_ting::before { display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; font-size: 10px; width: 2em; height: 2em; mask-position: 50% 50%; mask-repeat: no-repeat; mask-size: 100%; background-color: currentcolor; content: ""; margin-right: 2px; .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --weui-BTN-ACTIVE-MASK: rgba(255, 255, 255, .2); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --weui-BTN-ACTIVE-MASK: rgba(255, 255, 255, .2); } } .wx-root, body { --weui-BTN-DEFAULT-ACTIVE-BG: #e6e6e6; } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --weui-BTN-DEFAULT-ACTIVE-BG: rgba(255, 255, 255, .126); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --weui-BTN-DEFAULT-ACTIVE-BG: rgba(255, 255, 255, .126); } } .wx-root, body { --weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR: rgba(0, 0, 0, .1); } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR: rgba(255, 255, 255, .1); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR: rgba(255, 255, 255, .1); } } .weui-primary-loading { font-size: 16px; display: inline-flex; position: relative; width: 1em; height: 1em; vertical-align: middle; color: rgb(96, 96, 96); animation: 1s steps(60) 0s infinite normal none running circleLoading; } .weui-primary-loading__dot { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 50%; margin-left: -0.04375em; width: 0.0875em; height: 0.0875em; border-top-right-radius: 100%; border-bottom-right-radius: 100%; background: currentcolor; } .weui-primary-loading::before, .weui-primary-loading::after { content: ""; display: block; width: 0.5em; height: 1em; box-sizing: border-box; border: 0.0875em solid; } .weui-primary-loading::before { border-right-width: 0px; border-top-left-radius: 1em; border-bottom-left-radius: 1em; mask-image: linear-gradient(rgb(0, 0, 0) 8%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 95%); } .weui-primary-loading::after { border-left-width: 0px; border-top-right-radius: 1em; border-bottom-right-radius: 1em; mask-image: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 8%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 95%); } .weui-primary-loading__dot { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 50%; margin-left: -0.04375em; width: 0.0875em; height: 0.0875em; border-top-right-radius: 0.0875em; border-bottom-right-radius: 0.0875em; background: currentcolor; } @keyframes circleLoading { 0% { transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 360deg); } } .weui-primary-loading_brand { color: var(--weui-BRAND); } .weui-primary-loading_transparent { color: rgb(237, 237, 237); } mp-common-search, mppoi, qqmusic, redpacketcover, mpvoice, mp-wxaproduct, mpcps, mp-qa, mplive, mpproduct, .video_iframe { pointer-events: auto; } .ct_geography_loc_card { background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 8px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .location_title { font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.3; padding: 0px 4px; } .location_detail { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); line-height: 1.3; padding: 4px 4px 12px; } .line-clamp1 { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .location_img_wrp { width: 100%; padding-top: 37.88%; border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; background-size: 200%; background-position: center center; } .location_img { width: 100%; height: 100px; object-fit: cover; transform-origin: center center; transform: scale(2); } .ct_geography_loc_tip { text-align: center; padding: 0px 5px; margin: 16px auto; } .ct_geography_loc_tip::before { content: ""; display: inline-block; position: .qa__card-hd::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 20px; right: 20px; bottom: 0px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); transform: scaleY(0.5); transform-origin: left bottom; } .qa__card-hd:last-child { padding-bottom: 20px; } .qa__card-hd:last-child::after { display: none; } .qa__list:last-child { padding-bottom: 8px; } .qa__list-answer { color: rgb(87, 107, 149); text-align: center; display: block; padding: 16px 0px; font-size: 14px; } .qa__list-answer_desc { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .qa__hd-notice { display: block; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); line-height: .qa__list-hd-action { display: block; float: right; color: rgb(87, 107, 149); } .qa__list { display: block; } .qa__list-item { padding: 10px 20px; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; font-size: .qa__action { display: flex; align-items: center; color: rgb(87, 107, 149); padding: 0px 8px; position: relative; } .qa__action i:not(:last-child) { margin-right: 4px; } .qa__action:last-child { 255, 255); font-size: 16px; } .account_info { padding: 0px 0px 20px; } .account_info .flex_bd { padding-left: 0.85em; } .radius_avatar.account_avatar { width: 28px; height: 28px; padding: 0px; } .account_nickname { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 1; line-height: 1.2; color: rgb(87, 107, 149); font-size: 14px; } .account_nickname_inner { font-weight: 400; vertical-align: top; } .account_desc { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 1; color: rgb(178, 178, 178); font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.2; padding-top: 0.3em; } .account_desc_inner { display: inline; vertical-align: top; } .share_notice { margin-bottom: 16px; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .share_media { padding-bottom: 18px; } .original_panel { padding: 20px; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; overflow: hidden; position: relative; } .original_panel .original_account { margin-bottom: 12px; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .original_panel .original_account_avatar { width: 28px; height: 28px; padding: 0px; } .original_panel .original_account_nickname { padding-left: 0.85em; font-size: 15px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .original_panel_title { font-size: 17px; line-height: 24px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); font-weight: 700; margin: 0px 0px 8px; } .original_panel_content { color: rgb(34, 34, 34); } .original_panel_tool { padding-top: 20px; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .wx-root, body { --APPMSGCARD-BG: #FAFAFA; } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --APPMSGCARD-BG: #1E1E1E; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --APPMSGCARD-BG: #1E1E1E; } } .wx-root, body { --APPMSGCARD-LINE-BG: rgba(0, 0, 0, .07); } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --APPMSGCARD-LINE-BG: rgba(255, 255, 255, .07); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --APPMSGCARD-LINE-BG: rgba(255, 255, 255, .07); } } .appmsg_card_context { position: relative; background-color: var(--APPMSGCARD-BG); border-radius: 8px; user-select: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .original_area_primary { margin-bottom: 24px; font-size: 15px; } .original_primary_tips { padding: 0px 16px 32px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .original_primary_tips p:first-child { font-weight: 700; padding-bottom: 8px; line-height: 1.4; } .original_primary_card_tips { line-height: 1.4; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .original_primary_card { padding: 20px 16px; margin-top: 16px; line-height: 1.4; align-items: center; } .original_primary_card .radius_avatar { padding: 0px; width: 40px; height: 40px; margin-right: 12px; vertical-align: middle; } .original_primary_card .weui-flex__item { min-width: 0px; } .original_primary_card .weui-flex__ft { position: relative; padding-right: 24px; } .original_primary_card .weui-flex__ft::after { content: ""; font-size: 12px; background: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8, %3Csvg width='10' height='20' viewBox='0 0 10 20' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' xmlns:xlink='http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink'%3E%3Cdefs%3E%3Cpath d='M6.323 10.358l-.884.884L.623 6.426a.83.83 0 0 1 0-1.177L5.44.433l.884.884-4.52 4.52 4.52 4.521z' id='a'/%3E%3C/defs%3E%3Cuse fill='%23000' transform='rotate(-180 4.184 7.921)' xlink:href='%23a' fill-rule='evenodd' opacity='.3' /%3E%3C/svg%3E") 0px 0px / 1em no-repeat transparent; width: 1em; height: 2em; position: absolute; right: 0px; top: 50%; margin-top: -1em; } .original_primary_nickname { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; display: block; } .original_primary_desc { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); font-size: 14px; padding-top: 4px; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; } .original_page { background-color: transparent; } .account_info { -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); outline: 0px; padding-bottom: 16px; font-size: 16px; } .account_info.appmsg_account_info { padding-bottom: 32px; } .account_info .radius_avatar img { background-color: transparent; } .share_notice { font-size: 17px; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .original_panel .original_account_avatar { width: 30px; height: 30px; } .original_panel_tool { font-size: 14px; } .original_panel_tool a { color: rgb(87, 107, 149); } .original_panel_content { opacity: 0.9; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .share_media { padding-bottom: 30px; } .live-icon { font-size: 20px; color: rgb(255, 97, 70); vertical-align: bottom; position: relative; height: 1em; width: 1em; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; } .live-icon-scale { transform: scale(0.25); position: absolute; height: 4em; width: 4em; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .live-icon-inner { position: absolute; width: 1.84em; height: 1.84em; background: currentcolor; border-radius: 50%; animation: 2.3s linear 0s infinite normal none running live-icon-inner; } @keyframes live-icon-inner { 0% { animation-timing-function: ease-in; } 23% { width: 1.9em; height: 1.9em; animation-timing-function: ease-out; } 43% { width: 0px; height: 0px; animation-timing-function: linear; } 55% { width: 0px; height: 0px; animation-timing-function: ease-in; } 74% { width: 2em; height: 2em; animation-timing-function: ease-out; } } .live-icon-outer { border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; position: absolute; width: 1.84em; height: 1.84em; animation: 2.3s linear 0s infinite normal none running live-icon-outer; } @keyframes live-icon-outer { 0% { width: 1.84em; height: 1.84em; border-width: 0px; animation-timing-function: ease-out; } 22% { width: 2.2em; height: 2.2em; border-width: 0px; animation-timing-function: ease-out; } 50% { width: 2.8em; height: 2.8em; border-width: 1.4em; animation-timing-function: ease-in; } 72% { width: 2.2em; height: 2.2em; border-width: 0px; animation-timing-function: ease-in; } 100% { width: 1.84em; height: 1.84em; border-width: 0px; } } .live-icon-wrapper { border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; border: 0.3em solid; position: absolute; width: 3.4em; height: 3.4em; animation: 2.3s ease 0s infinite normal none running live-icon-wrapper; } @keyframes live-icon-wrapper { 0% { animation-timing-function: ease-in; } 23.9% { width: 2.05em; height: 2.05em; opacity: 1; } 24%, 74% { opacity: 0; } 74.1% { width: 2.05em; height: 2.05em; opacity: 1; } 100% { animation-timing-function: ease-out; } } .wxw_wechannel_card { margin: 16px auto; font-size: 14px; text-align: left; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: normal; overflow: hidden; width: 66.5%; max-width: 300px; position: relative; } .wxw_wechannel_card.wx_tap_highlight_active { background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247); } .wxw_wechannel_card.wx_tap_highlight_active::after { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); } .wxw_wechannel_msg { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: rgb(247, 247, 247); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0px 24px; box-sizing: border-box; z-index: 1; } .wxw_wechannel_card_ft { padding: 8px 12px; align-items: center; position: relative; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .wxw_wechannel_card_ft::before { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); content: " "; position: absolute; top: 0px; height: 1px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transform: scaleY(0.3); left: 12px; right: 12px; } .wxw_wechannel_profile { padding: 12px; align-items: center; } .wxw_wechannel_avatar.wxw_wechannel_avatar { width: 20px; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 8px; height: 20px !important; } .wxw_wechannel_nickname { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); font-weight: 500; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; line-height: 1.2; } .wxw_wechannel_desc { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; padding: 0px 12px 12px; margin-top: -4px; } .wxw_wechannel_logo { margin-right: 5px; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; width: 18px; background-size: cover; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='18' height='18' viewBox='0 0 18 18'%3E %3Cg fill='none' background-size: cover; } .wxw_wechannel_video_context .weui-play-btn_primary { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); } .wxw_wechannel_img_context { position: relative; white-space: nowrap; font-size: 0px; background-size: cover; } .wxw_wechannel_img_list { max-width: none !important; } .wxw_wechannel_img { pointer-events: none; min-height: 65vw; max-height: 88vw; background-position: 50% 0px; background-size: cover; } .wxw_wechannel_img_navs { padding: 12px 12px 0px; text-align: center; margin-bottom: -4px; } .wxw_wechannel_img_nav { display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; width: 6px; height: 6px; margin: 0px 4px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .wxw_wechannel_img_nav.wxw_wechannel_img_nav_current { background: rgb(250, 157, 59); } .wxw_wechannel_video_context { position: relative; } .wxw_wechannel_video_context .weui-play-btn { width: 52px; height: 52px; } .wxw_wechannel_card_live { width: auto; max-width: none; } .wxw_wechannel_card_live .wxw_wechannel_card_bd .wxw_wechannel_live_desc { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; } .wxw_wechannel_card_live .wxw_wechannel_card_ft { padding-left: 16px; padding-right: 16px; } .wxw_wechannel_card_live .wxw_wechannel_card_ft::before { left: 16px; right: 16px; } .wxw_wechannel_live_context { font-size: 14px; padding: 20px 16px 16px; } .wxw_wechannel_live_overview { align-items: center; } .icon_wxw_wechannel_live { display: inline-block; vertical-align: cover no-repeat; background-color: currentcolor; } .wxw_wechannel_live_hd { display: flex; } .wxw_wechannel_live_ft { padding-left: 16px; } .wxw_wechannel_live_nickname, .wxw_wechannel_live_desc { display: block; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); } .wxw_wechannel_live_nickname { width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; } .wxw_wechannel_live_desc { margin-top: 2px; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .wxw_wechannel_live_tips { margin-top: 16px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); line-height: 1.4; font-size: 14px; } .wxw_wechannel_live_hd .wxw_wechannel_live_avatar { width: 4.4em; border-radius: 100%; margin-right: 10px; font-size: 10px; height: 4.4em !important; } .wxw_wechannel_live_ft .wxw_wechannel_live_btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; letter-spacing: 1px; } .wxw_wechannel_live_btn { background: rgb(255, 97, 70); } .wxw_wechannel_live_btn .icon_wxw_wechannel_live { margin-right: 4px; } .wxw_wechannel_live_btn.weui-btn_disabled { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03); } .wxw_wechannel_live_btn.wx_tap_highlight_active { position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .wxw_wechannel_live_btn.wx_tap_highlight_active::after { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .wxw_wechannel_card_topic { width: auto; max-width: none; } .wxw_wechannel_card_topic .wxw_wechannel_card_ft { padding-left: 16px; padding-right: 16px; } .wxw_wechannel_card_topic .wxw_wechannel_card_ft::before { left: 16px; right: 16px; } .wxw_wechannel_topic_context { font-size: 14px; padding: 20px 16px 16px; } .wxw_wechannel_topic_overview { align-items: center; } .wxw_wechannel_topic_hd { display: flex; } .wxw_wechannel_topic_ft { padding-left: 16px; } .wxw_wechannel_topic_profile { margin-bottom: 20px; } .wxw_wechannel_topic_nickname, .wxw_wechannel_topic_name { display: block; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; } .wxw_wechannel_topic_nickname { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; } .wxw_wechannel_topic_name { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; } .wxw_wechannel_topic_tips { margin-top: 16px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); line-height: 1.4; font-size: 14px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; white-space: pre-wrap; } .wxw_wechannel_topic_tips + .wxw_wechannel_topic_tips { margin-top: 4px; } .wxw_wechannel_topic_hd .wxw_wechannel_topic_avatar { width: 2em; border-radius: 100%; margin-right: 8px; font-size: 10px; height: 2em !important; } .wxw_wechannel_topic_ft .wxw_wechannel_topic_btn { background-color: rgb(250, 157, 59); padding: 0px 12px; min-width: 60px; font-size: 14px; line-height: calc(2.28571); position: relative; z-index: 1; } .wxw_wechannel_topic_ft .wxw_wechannel_topic_btn:active::before { display: none; } .wxw_wechannel_topic_ft .wxw_wechannel_topic_btn.wxw_wechannel_topic_btn_active::before { display: block; content: ""; } .wxw_wechannel_logo_tail::before { content: "┬Ę"; margin: 0px 2px; } .wxw_wechannel_card_horizontal { width: 100%; } .wxw_wechannel_card_horizontal .wxw_wechannel_video_context { min-height: 56vw; max-height: 75vw; padding-bottom: 0px; } @media screen and (min-width: .wxw_wechannel_card.wx_tap_highlight_active::after { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); } .wxw_wechannel_card_ft { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } .wxw_wechannel_card_ft::before { border-top-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .wxw_wechannel_live_btn { background: rgb(255, 97, 70); } .wxw_wechannel_live_btn.wx_tap_highlight_active::after { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .wxw_wechannel_nickname, .wxw_wechannel_desc { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } .wxw_wechannel_live_tips { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } .wxw_wechannel_img_nav { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .wxw_wechannel_msg { background: rgb(32, 32, 32); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .wxw_wechannel_live_nickname, .wxw_wechannel_live_desc, .wxw_wechannel_topic_name { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } .wxw_wechannel_topic_nickname, .wxw_wechannel_topic_tips { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } .wxw_wechannel_topic_ft .wxw_wechannel_topic_btn { background-color: rgb(200, 125, 47); } } .wx_search_highlight { animation: 2s ease-in-out 0.15s 1 normal none running searchHighlight; } @-webkit-keyframes searchHighlight { 0% { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } 30% { background-color: rgba(7, 193, 96, 0.3); } 70% { background-color: rgba(7, 193, 96, 0.3); } 100% { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } } @keyframes searchHighlight { 0% { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } 30% { background-color: rgba(7, 193, 96, 0.3); } 70% { background-color: rgba(7, 193, 96, 0.3); } 100% { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } } .icon_appmsg_tag { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; padding: 0px 4px; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.67; border-radius: 2px; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; max-width: 70%; font-style: normal; letter-spacing: normal; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .icon_appmsg_tag.primary { color: rgb(59, 182, 56); padding: 4px 0.78em; background-color: rgba(9, 187, 7, 0.08); font-size: 12px; border-radius: 0.95em / 50%; } .icon_appmsg_tag.default { border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); background-color: transparent; padding: 0px 0.54em; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.3; border-radius: 0.67em / 50%; } .rich_media_meta_list .icon_appmsg_tag.default { margin-top: -1px; } .icon_appmsg_tag.title_tag { background-color: rgb(208, 75, 78); } .icon_appmsg_tag.theme_tag { background: rgba(6, 174, 86, 0.1); color: rgb(6, 174, 86); } .icon_global_tag_wrp { text-align: right; padding-bottom: 12px; } .icon_global_tag { background-color: rgba(118, 118, 118, 0.16); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.41); line-height: 2.2; border-top-left-radius: 1em 50%; border-bottom-left-radius: 1em 50%; padding: 0px 1.8em 0px 1.34em; font-size: 12px; margin-right: -24px; display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; } body .weui-icon-proof { mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='16' height='16' viewBox='0 0 fill-opacity='0.3'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); margin: 0px 0px 2px 4px; color: var(--weui-FG); } .article-tag__list { font-size: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 24px 0px 0px; border-radius: 0px; background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); user-select: none; } .article-tag__list:empty { margin: 0px; display: none; } .article-tag__list.single-tag__wrp { padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .article-tag__list.single-tag__wrp .article-tag-card__title { line-height: 20px; display: inline-block; } .article-tag__list.single-tag__wrp .article-tag__item-wrp { display: inline-block; } .article-tag__list.single-tag__wrp .article-tag-card__left { margin-right: 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .article-tag__list.single-tag__wrp .article-tag-card__right { font-size: 15px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); line-height: 20px; padding-right: 14px; flex-shrink: 0; position: relative; } .article-tag__list.single-tag__wrp .article-tag-card__right::after { content: ""; position: absolute; right: 0px; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; font-size: 10px; width: 1em; height: 2em; background-size: cover; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='10' height='20' viewBox='0 0 10 20'%3E %3Cpath fill-opacity='.3' fill-rule='evenodd' d='M2.045 5.484l.884-.884 4.816 4.816a.83.83 0 0 1 0 1.177l-4.816 4.816-.884-.884 4.52-4.52-4.52-4.521z'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); } .article-tag__list .article-tag__item { display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; line-height: 14px; color: rgb(87, 107, 149); } .article-tag__list .article-tag__item:last-child { margin-right: 0px; } .article-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; } .article-tag__item-wrp { margin: 8px 12px 0px 0px; gap: 4px; position: relative; display: flex; } .article-tag__item-wrp.weui-wa-hotarea::after { min-height: 100%; padding: 3px 6px; } .article-tag__item-wrp:last-child { margin-right: 0px; } .article-tag__item-wrp.no-active .article-tag__item { background: transparent; } .article-tag__item-num { display: inline-block; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 14px; } .article-tag-card__title { font-size: 15px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); line-height: 20px; } .article-tag__error-tips { background: rgb(76, 76, 76); border-radius: 8px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 17px; position: fixed; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); top: 45%; left: 50%; z-index: 3; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .article-tag__list.single-tag__wrp .article-tag-card__right { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .article-tag__list.single-tag__wrp .article-tag-card__right::after { background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='10' height='20' viewBox='0 0 10 20'%3E %3Cpath fill='%23FFFFFF' fill-opacity='.3' fill-rule='evenodd' d='M2.045 5.484l.884-.884 4.816 4.816a.83.83 0 0 1 0 1.177l-4.816 4.816-.884-.884 4.52-4.52-4.52-4.521z'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .article-tag__list .article-tag__item { color: rgb(125, 144, 169); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .article-tag__error-tips { background: rgb(64, 64, 64); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .article-tag-card__title { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .article-tag__item-num { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } } .read-more__area { margin: 30px 0px; } .read-more__desc { margin-bottom: 10px; } .read-more__article__extra { font-size: 14px; color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .read-more__article__item { margin-bottom: format("truetype"); } .pay button { min-width: 184px; box-sizing: border-box; min-height: 48px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: rgb(250, 157, 59); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-size: 17px; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: none; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 500; position: relative; outline: 0px; width: auto; font-family: -apple-system-font, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Helvetica Neue", "PingFang SC", "Hiragino Sans GB", "Microsoft YaHei UI", "Microsoft YaHei", Arial, sans-serif; overflow: hidden; user-select: none; white-space: nowrap; } .pay button .price { font-family: WeChatSansStd-Medium; } .pay button > div { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .pay button > div .weui-primary-loading { margin-top: 0px; } .pay .weui-btn_primary { background-color: rgb(250, 157, 59); } .pay .weui-btn_primary:not(.weui-btn_disabled):active { background-color: rgb(250, 157, 59); } .pay .weui-btn_primary:not(.weui-btn_disabled):active::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .pay button:not(.btn_disabled):active::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .pay button.btn_disabled { background-color: rgb(242, 242, 242); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18); } .pay_new button { background-color: rgb(7, 193, 96); font-size: 14px; min-height: 40px; font-weight: 700; } .pay_new .pay__notice-btn-lg, .pay_new .pay__notice-btn-lg button { font-size: 17px; } .pay_new .price { font-family: WeChatSansSS-Medium; font-weight: 500; } .pay_new .pay__icon-wecoin { margin-right: 0.17em; margin-top: -2px; } .pay_new .weui-btn_primary { background-color: rgb(7, 193, 96); } .pay_new .weui-btn_primary:not(.weui-btn_disabled):active { background-color: rgb(7, 193, 96); } .pay__mask { position: absolute; width: 100%; left: 0px; bottom: 0px; text-align: center; } .pay__notice { padding: 16px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; border-top: .5px solid var(--weui-FG-3); position: fixed; bottom: 0px; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%); background-color: var(--weui-BG-3); z-index: 500; transition: 0.3s; } .pay__notice button.btn_disabled { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .pay__notice .weui-btn { padding: 0px 16px; min-width: 0px; } .pay__notice_largeFont .pay__intro-content { display: block; margin-right: 12px; } .pay__notice_largeFont .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-title, .pay__notice_largeFont .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-desc { font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 12px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .pay__notice_largeFont .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-title { white-space: nowrap; } .pay__notice_largeFont .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-title::after { content: "’╝ī"; } .pay__notice_new { transition: none; background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); } .pay__notice_new .pay__intro-content { flex-flow: row; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; } .pay__notice_new .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-title, .pay__notice_new .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-desc { font-size: 14px; color: var(--weui-FG-1); margin-top: 0px; } .pay__notice_new .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-title { white-space: nowrap; } .pay__notice_new .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-title::after { content: "’╝ī"; } .pay__notice_new .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-title.empty-after-content::after { content: ""; } .pay__notice_new .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-desc { white-space: normal; } .pay__notice_new .weui-btn { padding: 5px 8px; min-height: 36px; } .pay__notice_show { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; } .pay__notice-intro { display: flex; padding-top: 8px; max-width: 677px; align-items: center; } .pay__intro-content { flex: 1 1 0%; font-size: 14px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: center; } .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-desc { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); line-height: 20px; margin-top: 3px; } .pay__notice-title { line-height: 24px; font-size: 17px; } .pay__notice-main { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); padding-right: 30px; font-size: 17px; display: flex; align-items: center; height: 54px; } .pay__notice-close { position: absolute; right: 0px; top: 0px; padding: 16px; font-size: 0px; } .pay__notice-close::before { content: ""; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; width: 24px; height: 24px; background-size: cover; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' xmlns:xlink='http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink' width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24'%3E %3Cdefs%3E %3Cpath id='c4adbcb4-e5f6-47ae-8835-e10a689c1c34-a' d='M8 6.943L1.807.75.75 1.807 6.943 8 .75 14.193l1.057 1.057L8 9.057l6.193 6.193 1.057-1.057L9.057 8l6.193-6.193L14.193.75z'/%3E %3C/defs%3E %3Cuse fill-opacity='.9' fill-rule='evenodd' opacity='.3' transform='translate(4 4)' xlink:href='%23c4adbcb4-e5f6-47ae-8835-e10a689c1c34-a'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); } .pay__worth { appearance: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); outline: 0px; background-color: transparent; border: 0px; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; padding: 0px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 2.13333; color: rgb(87, 107, 149); } .pay__worth::before { content: ""; display: inline-block; margin-top: -0.25em; vertical-align: middle; width: 20px; height: 20px; background-size: cover; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='20' height='20' viewBox='0 0 20 20'%3E %3Cg fill='none' fill-rule='evenodd'%3E %3Cpath d='M0 .pay__worth-desc { color: rgb(87, 107, 149); font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; } .pay__desc { font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; margin-top: 12px; text-align: center; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); margin-bottom: -8px; } .pay__notice-qrcode { display: none; position: absolute; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%); bottom: 70px; width: 218px; padding: 40px 0px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(51, 51, 51); box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 1px 9px; border-radius: 4px; text-align: center; z-index: 100; } .pay__qrcode-wrp { height: 124px; } .pay__qrcode-wrp img { width: 124px; } .pay__qrcode-title { margin-top: 20px; font-size: 14px; } .pay__static { position: relative; z-index: 10; text-align: center; padding-bottom: 48px; margin-bottom: -23px; } .pay__static h3 { padding-top: 40px; font-size: 17px; margin-bottom: 4px; font-weight: 500; } .pay__static p { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .pay__static button { margin-top: 32px; outline: none; } .pay__static button:active { outline: none; } .pay__static .pay__notice-qrcode_bottom { top: 120px; bottom: auto; } .pay__mask_static { margin-top: -120px; height: 120px; position: relative; background: linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); pointer-events: none; } @media screen and (min-width: 677px) { .pay__notice-intro { max-width: 677px; margin: 0px auto; box-sizing: border-box; position: relative; } } .reward_area + .pay__detail-wrp { margin-top: 12px !important; padding-top: 0px !important; } .reward_qrcode_area + .pay__detail-wrp { margin-top: 12px !important; padding-top: 0px !important; } .pay__main + .pay__detail-wrp { margin-bottom: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 20px !important; padding-top: 0px !important; } .pay__head-notice { font-size: 14px; padding-top: 12px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); line-height: 20px; } .pay__preview-tips { color: var(--weui-FG-2); margin-top: 12px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; } .pay__gift { background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247); border-radius: 4px; padding: 20px; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 16px; user-select: none; } .pay__gift-hd { display: flex; align-items: center; } .pay__gift-sender-avatar { font-size: 0px; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 2.8px; overflow: hidden; margin-right: 8px; } .pay__gift-sender-avatar img { width: 100%; height: 100%; } .pay__gift-sender-name { margin-right: 8px; font-weight: 500; } .pay__gift-bd { margin-top: 8px; line-height: 19.6px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .pay__gift-send { position: fixed; left: 12px; right: 12px; background-color: rgb(243, 243, 243); padding: 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; z-index: 1000; border-radius: 8px; user-select: none; bottom: -64px; opacity: 0; transition: bottom 0.3s, opacity 0.3s; } .pay__gift-send_static { position: static; opacity: 1; transition: none; margin: 16px 0px 32px; } @media (min-width: 375px) { .pay__gift-send_static { width: 344px; box-sizing: border-box; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; } } .pay__gift-send.show { opacity: 1; bottom: calc(8px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); } .pay__gift-send-content { flex: 1 1 0%; } .pay__gift-send-title { font-size: 17px; } .pay__gift-send-desc { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .pay__gift-send-btn { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); padding: 0px 12px; border-radius: 3px; background-color: rgb(220, 189, 126); font-weight: 500; line-height: 32px; font-size: 16px; margin-left: 12px; text-align: center; overflow: hidden; position: relative; user-select: none; } .pay__gift-send-btn:active::after { content: ""; width: 100%; height: 100%; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .pay__icon-wecoin { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; width: 16px; height: 16px; mask: 50% 50% / cover no-repeat; background-color: currentcolor; margin-right: 0.26em; } .pay__wecoin { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; padding-top: 20px; } .pay__wecoin-title { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 24px; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; } .pay__wecoin-title .pay__icon-wecoin { width: 24px; color: rgb(7, 193, 96); height: 24px; margin-bottom: 16px; } .pay__wecoin-content { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 44px; } .pay__wecoin-content .pay__icon-wecoin { width: 30px; height: 30px; color: rgb(7, 193, 96); margin-right: 4px; } .pay__wecoin-content .price { font-size: 40px; font-family: WeChatSansStd-Medium; } .pay__wecoin-tips { margin-top: 12px; margin-bottom: -8px; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .pay__wecoin-term { font-size: 14px; color: rgb(170, 170, 170); margin-bottom: 16px; } .pay__wecoin-term .weui-icon-checked { margin-right: 0.2em; margin-bottom: 1px; width: 1.07em !important; height: 1.07em !important; } .pay__wecoin-content-price { margin-top: -16px; } .pay__bottom-modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__ft { padding-bottom: 16px; } .pay__bottom-modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__attachment-area a { font-size: 14px; } .pay__wecoin-entry { background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0px 8px; font-size: 15px; height: 1.6em; border-radius: 0.8em; } .pay__wecoin-entry .pay__icon-wecoin { width: 15px; height: 15px; color: rgb(7, 193, 96); margin-bottom: 1px; } .pay__wecoin-entry .price { font-size: 15px; font-family: WeChatSansStd-Medium; } .pay__wecoin-entry::after { content: ""; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; width: 0.53em; height: 1.06em; mask: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='8' height='16' viewBox='0 0 8 16'%3E %3Cpath fill-opacity='.5' fill-rule='evenodd' d='M1.636 4.387l.707-.707 3.853
