calc(2.55294em + 2px); display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; } .wx_identity_group .weui-cell__desc { padding-top: 2px; font-size: 14px; } .wx_identity_group .weui-btn_plate-circle { border-radius: 4px; } .wx_identity_group .weui-btn_plate-circle .weui-icon-outlined-add { width: 2em; height: 2em; } .wx_identity_group .weui-cells__tips.weui-cells__tips { margin-top: 12px; padding: 0 var(--weui-cellPaddingLR); } .sync_interactive_identity { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; color: var(--weui-FG-2); font-size: 14px; padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; padding-left: var(--weui-cellPaddingLR); padding-right: var(--weui-cellPaddingLR); } .sync_interactive_identity .sync_interactive_identity_checkbox { display: flex; margin-right: 4px; } .sync_interactive_identity .sync_interactive_identity_checkbox .weui-icon-checked { width: 1.6em; height: 1.6em; mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='25' height='24' style='stroke:black;stroke-opacity:0.3;' stroke-width='1.2'/%3E%3C/svg%3E%0A"); mask-repeat: no-repeat; mask-size: 100% 1.6em; background: var(--weui-FG-2); } .sync_interactive_identity fill='white' style='fill:white;fill-opacity:1;'/%3E%3C/svg%3E%0A") 50% 50% / 100% 1.6em no-repeat transparent; } .wx_identity_avatar { display: block; font-size: 40px; width: 1em; height: 1em; border-radius: 100%; vertical-align: top; background-size: cover; background-position: 50% 50%; } .wx_identity_avatar.private { border-radius: 4px; transform: scale(calc(0.95)); } .wx_identity_nickname { width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; font-weight: 400; } .wx_identity_nickname + .weui-icon-mp, .wx_identity_nickname + .weui-icon-ph { flex-shrink: 0; width: 1.6em; height: 1.6em; margin-left: 4px; } .wx_identity_nickname + .weui-icon-channels.weui-icon-channels { flex-shrink: 0; width: 1.6em; height: 1.6em; margin-left: 4px; } .weui-pc-popover__area { position: relative; } .weui-pc-popover__wrp { opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; user-select: none; } .weui-pc-popover__wrp .weui-mask { display: none; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .weui-pc-popover { --weui-pc-popover-tail-size: 14px; --weui-pc-popover-negative-space: 8px; --weui-pc-popover-offset: 12px; --weui-pc-popover-alignOffset: 24px; --weui-pc-popover-target-rect: 0px; --weui-pc-popover-tail-alignOffset: calc(var(--weui-pc-popover-alignOffset) + var(--weui-pc-popover-target-rect) / 2 - var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-size) / 2); position: absolute; z-index: 5000; width: 288px; box-sizing: border-box; background-color: var(--weui-BG-5); filter: drop-shadow(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 2px 2px 8px); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--weui-FG-0); line-height: 1.4; border-radius: 8px; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.1); transform: scale(0); } .weui-pc-popover__tail { --weui-radiusTailSize: var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-size); --weui-radiusTailColor: var(--weui-BG-5); pointer-events: none; position: absolute; color: var(--weui-BG-5); background: currentcolor; border-radius: 2px; } .weui-pc-popover__tail::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail::after { position: absolute; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: currentcolor -7.5px 0px 0px 0px; } .weui-pc-popover__tail::before { bottom: -6.8px; left: 5.5px; transform: rotate(70.5deg); transform-origin: 0px 0px; } .weui-pc-popover__tail::after { top: -2.2px; right: -7px; transform: rotate(16deg); transform-origin: 0px 100%; } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-top, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-bottom, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-left, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-right { width: var(--weui-radiusTailSize); height: var(--weui-radiusTailSize); } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-top::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-bottom::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-left::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-right::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-top::after, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-bottom::after, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-left::after, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-right::after { content: ""; } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-bottom { bottom: calc(1px - var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); left: 50%; margin-left: calc(-1 * var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); transform: rotate(45deg); } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-top { top: calc(1px - var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); left: 50%; margin-left: calc(-1 * var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); transform: rotate(225deg); } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-left { left: calc(1px - var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); top: 50%; margin-top: calc(-1 * var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); transform: rotate(135deg); } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-right { right: calc(1px - var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); top: 50%; margin-top: calc(-1 * var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); transform: rotate(315deg); } .weui-pc-popover__hd { padding: 24px; } .weui-pc-popover__title { text-align: center; font-size: 14px; } .weui-pc-popover__bd { position: .weui-cell__ft.weui-cell__ft { padding: 0px; } body .weui-cell_swiped > .weui-cell__bd { background: transparent; } body .weui-cell_swiped > .weui-cell__ft { left: 100%; right: auto; z-index: 5; } body .weui-cell_swiped .weui-swiped-btn { font-size: 17px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); white-space: nowrap; border: 0px; outline: 0px; } body .weui-cell_swiped-bounce > .weui-cell__bd { transition: transform 0.16s ease-in-out; } body .weui-cell_swiped-bounce .weui-swiped-btn { transition: transform 0.16s ease-in-out; } body .weui-cell_swiped-overflow > .weui-cell__bd { transition: transform 0.2s linear; } body .weui-cell_swiped-overflow .weui-swiped-btn { transition: transform 0.2s linear; } body .weui-cell_custom-active::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background: var(--weui-FG-3); pointer-events: none; } ------MultipartBoundary--O3bHuCGcN1IEAj0JQWQZ7xoV0BvmXQfkwiPGevl8iP---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-Location: Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-Location: cid:css-e8f8da53-768c-4b40-bc9d-f2f2426180b3@mhtml.blink @charset "utf-8"; .wx_at_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog { padding: 0px; z-index: 5051; } .wx_at_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog__bd { padding-bottom: calc(24px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); } .wx_at_dialog .weui-mask { z-index: 5050; } .wx_at_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd, .wx_at_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog__ft { padding: 0 calc(24px + env(safe-area-inset-right)) 0 calc(24px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search { background-color: var(--weui-BG-1); border-radius: 4px; height: 36px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: 0px 16px; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search .weui-icon-search { color: var(--weui-FG-2); } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search .clear { display: none; margin-right: 8px; transition: 0.3s ease-in-out; transform: scale(0); opacity: 0; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search .clear .weui-icon-clear { color: var(--weui-FG-2); width: 1.6em; height: 1.6em; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search .clear.show { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search .clear.weui-wa-hotarea::after { min-width: 36px; min-height: 36px; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search input { width: 2em; border: 0px; background-color: transparent; font-size: 17px; padding: 0px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 4px; color: var(--weui-FG-0); outline: 0px; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search.at-dialog_search-focused .weui-icon-search { margin-left: 8px; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search.at-dialog_search-focused .clear { display: inline; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search.at-dialog_search-focused input { flex: 1 1 0%; padding-right: 10px; margin: 0px 4px; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_loading { margin-top: 160px; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_loading .weui-loading { margin: 0px; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_tips { margin-top: 160px; color: var(--weui-FG-2); text-align: center; } ------MultipartBoundary--O3bHuCGcN1IEAj0JQWQZ7xoV0BvmXQfkwiPGevl8iP---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-Location: background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .weui-mask_transparent { position: fixed; z-index: 1000; inset: 0px; } .weui-half-screen-dialog { position: fixed; left: 0px; right: 0px; bottom: 0px; min-height: 255px; max-height: 75%; z-index: 5000; line-height: 1.4; background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); color: var(--weui-FG-0); border-top-left-radius: 12px; border-top-right-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; padding: 0 calc(24px + env(safe-area-inset-right)) env(safe-area-inset-bottom) calc(24px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); box-sizing: border-box; display: flex; flex-direction: column; outline: 0px; } @media only screen and (max-device-height: 558px) { .weui-half-screen-dialog { max-height: calc(100% - 16px); } } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd { min-height: 64px; display: flex; align-items: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd .weui-btn_icon { position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: inherit; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd .weui-btn_icon:active { opacity: 0.5; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__action-group { position: absolute; top: 50%; white-space: nowrap; transform: translateY(-50%); display: flex; align-items: center; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__action { margin-right: 16px; position: static; transform: none; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__action.weui-wa-hotarea { position: relative; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__action.weui-link { font-size: 15px; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__side { position: relative; left: -8px; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__main { flex: 1 1 0%; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__side + .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__main { text-align: center; padding: 0px 40px; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__main + .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__side { right: -8px; left: auto; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__main + .wx_bottom_modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__side + .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__main { padding: 0px; } .wx_bottom_modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__main { background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); } .wx_bottom_modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__main + .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__side { text-align: right; } .wx_bottom_modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__bd { flex: 1 1 0%; overflow-y: auto; .wx_bottom_modal .channel_title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; padding: 40px 20px 11.5px; } .wx_bottom_modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd_channel { padding: 0px !important; } .weui-mask { visibility: visible; } .wx_bottom_modal_show > .weui-half-screen-dialog { transform: translateZ(0px); } .wx_bottom_modal_show.wx_bottom_modal_right > .weui-half-screen-dialog { transform: .weui-mask.wx_bottom_modal_mask, .wx_bottom_modal_mask_fixed { top: -120px; } .fullscreen-padding .weui-mask.wx_bottom_modal_mask { transition: opacity 0.3s; } .wx_bottom_modal_mask_fixed { position: .weui-mask { z-index: 5000; } .wx_bottom_modal_group_container { height: 100%; transition: transform 0.3s; } .wx_bottom_modal_group { width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; position: absolute; top: 0px; } .wx_bottom_modal_group:first-child { position: static; } .wx_bottom_modal_mask { opacity: var(--opacity); } .fixed_title { font-size: 15px; text-size-adjust: 100%; } .fullscreen-padding .wx_bottom_modal_wrp .fade-enter, .fullscreen-padding .wx_bottom_modal_wrp .fade-leave-to { opacity: 0; } .fullscreen-padding .wx_bottom_modal_wrp .fade-enter-active,
